'''鈭歷-d-n''' ('''kavadan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:poise|poise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poise|poise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-d-n
|-
! Lemma
| kavadan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadan|thivadan]] || [[word:jivadan|jivadan]] || [[word:shivadan|shivadan]] || [[word:kivadan|kivadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadan|thuthuvadan]] || [[word:jujuvadan|jujuvadan]] || [[word:shushuvadan|shushuvadan]] || [[word:kukuvadan|kukuvadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvadan|thuvadan]] || [[word:juvadan|juvadan]] || [[word:shuvadan|shuvadan]] || [[word:kuvadan|kuvadan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvadan|thuvadan]] || [[word:juvadan|juvadan]] || [[word:shuvadan|shuvadan]] || [[word:kuvadan|kuvadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevadan|thevadan]] || [[word:jevadan|jevadan]] || [[word:shevadan|shevadan]] || [[word:kevadan|kevadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovadan|thothovadan]] || [[word:jojovadan|jojovadan]] || [[word:shoshovadan|shoshovadan]] || [[word:kokovadan|kokovadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovadan|thovadan]] || [[word:jovadan|jovadan]] || [[word:shovadan|shovadan]] || [[word:kovadan|kovadan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadan|thovadan]] || [[word:jovadan|jovadan]] || [[word:shovadan|shovadan]] || [[word:kovadan|kovadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙vadan|th忙vadan]] || [[word:j忙vadan|j忙vadan]] || [[word:sh忙vadan|sh忙vadan]] || [[word:k忙vadan|k忙vadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadan|thathavadan]] || [[word:jajavadan|jajavadan]] || [[word:shashavadan|shashavadan]] || [[word:kakavadan|kakavadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavadan|thavadan]] || [[word:javadan|javadan]] || [[word:shavadan|shavadan]] || [[word:kavadan|kavadan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavadan|thavadan]] || [[word:javadan|javadan]] || [[word:shavadan|shavadan]] || [[word:kavadan|kavadan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavadan|shavadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavadan|goshavadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavadan|gokishavadan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavadan眉|shavadan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavadankn眉|goshavadankn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadan眉|gokishavadan眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavadansh毛|shavadansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavadanksh毛|goshavadanksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavadansh毛|gokishavadansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadanro|shavadanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadankro|goshavadankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadanro|gokishavadanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadanmu|shavadanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadankmu|goshavadankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadanmu|gokishavadanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavadansher|shavadansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavadanksher|goshavadanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavadansher|gokishavadansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavadang|shavadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavadankng|goshavadankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavadang|gokishavadang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavadanya|shavadanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavadankya|goshavadankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavadanya|gokishavadanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavadanyam|shavadanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavadankyam|goshavadankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavadanyam|gokishavadanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadan眉sh毛|shavadan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadankn眉sh毛|goshavadankn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadan眉sh毛|gokishavadan眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadan眉ro|shavadan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadankn眉ro|goshavadankn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadan眉ro|gokishavadan眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadan眉mu|shavadan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadankn眉mu|goshavadankn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadan眉mu|gokishavadan眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadansh毛n眉|shavadansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadanksh毛n眉|goshavadanksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadansh毛n眉|gokishavadansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadansh毛ro|shavadansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadanksh毛ro|goshavadanksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadansh毛ro|gokishavadansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadansh毛mu|shavadansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadanksh毛mu|goshavadanksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadansh毛mu|gokishavadansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadanron眉|shavadanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadankron眉|goshavadankron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadanron眉|gokishavadanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadanrosh毛|shavadanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadankrosh毛|goshavadankrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadanrosh毛|gokishavadanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadanromu|shavadanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadankromu|goshavadankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadanromu|gokishavadanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadanmun眉|shavadanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadankmun眉|goshavadankmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadanmun眉|gokishavadanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadanmush毛|shavadanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadankmush毛|goshavadankmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadanmush毛|gokishavadanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadanmuro|shavadanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadankmuro|goshavadankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadanmuro|gokishavadanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
